data.body:
## Description

Replace the existing Step 4 (Present Spec for Approval) in brainstorm SKILL.md with a 4-option approval gate.

**Files to edit**: (1) `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` (edit), (2) `.test-index` (edit — remove RED marker)

Changes:
- Replace existing approval prompt with AskUserQuestion presenting 4 options:
  (a) Approve — advances to fidelity review
  (b) Perform red/blue team review cycle — re-runs scenario analysis (Step 2.75) and re-presents gate
  (c) Perform additional web research — re-runs research phase (Step 2.6) and re-presents gate
  (d) Let's discuss more — pauses for conversational review before re-presenting
- Labels: correctly label options as initial runs vs re-runs based on whether research/scenario analysis already executed
- Planning-intelligence log entry in epic spec: which bright-line conditions triggered (or 'none'), whether red/blue team ran and scenario count, whether practitioner requested additional cycles via gate
- Remove RED marker from .test-index

**TDD Requirement**: RED test from 92bd-27c1. After this task, all assertions GREEN and RED marker removed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains 4-option approval gate
  Verify: grep -qi 'approve\|fidelity review' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'red.*blue.*team\|scenario analysis' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'additional.*research\|web research' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'discuss' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Planning-intelligence log documented
  Verify: grep -qi 'planning.intelligence.*log\|log.*entry' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Approval gate test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep 'brainstorm/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -qF '[test_approval_gate]'
